tagline: AI-based peaceful heritage guide for spiritual and cultural travel

top_highlights.name: Maya Devi Temple
top_highlights.why_best: Sacred birthplace site of Lord Buddha with deep heritage value.

top_highlights.name: Lumbini Museum
top_highlights.why_best: Detailed history of Buddhism and Lumbini civilization.

top_highlights.name: Ashoka Pillar

best_places.name: Maya Devi Temple
best_places.why_best: Sacred birthplace site of Lord Buddha with deep heritage value.
best_places.safety_note: Prefer trusted transport and stay in well-lit routes.
best_places.historical_formation: Maya Devi Temple in Lumbini has layered local history. It developed as a sacred gathering point where pilgrimage, ritual practice, and community support systems grew together over generations. Today it connects tourists with community memory through food, rituals, architecture, and daily street life.

best_places.name: Lumbini Museum
best_places.why_best: Detailed history of Buddhism and Lumbini civilization.
best_places.safety_note: Prefer trusted transport and stay in well-lit routes.
best_places.historical_formation: Lumbini Museum in Lumbini has layered local history. It evolved as a historical landmark over multiple local governance periods, and later became a preserved reference point for regional identity. Today it connects tourists with community memory through food, rituals, architecture, and daily street life.

best_places.name: Ashoka Pillar
best_places.why_best: Ancient pillar marking the birthplace of Buddha, UNESCO world heritage.
best_places.safety_note: Prefer trusted transport and stay in well-lit routes.
best_places.historical_formation: Ashoka Pillar in Lumbini has layered local history. Local records and community memory describe it as a long-standing civic and spiritual core, expanded through royal-era patronage and traditional trade movement. Today it connects tourists with community memory through food, rituals, architecture, and daily street life.

best_places.name: Lumbini Monastic Zone
best_places.why_best: International monasteries with unique architecture and calm gardens.
best_places.safety_note: Prefer trusted transport and stay in well-lit routes.
best_places.historical_formation: Lumbini Monastic Zone in Lumbini has layered local history. The area formed around settlement clusters, festival routes, and artisan activity, gradually becoming a living cultural hub. Today it connects tourists with community memory through food, rituals, architecture, and daily street life.

famous_foods.name: Simple Veg Thali
famous_foods.origin_note: Simple Veg Thali in Lumbini: It became popular through a mix of local ingredients, migration influence, and city food-lane adaptation.

famous_foods.name: Tea and Local Snacks
famous_foods.origin_note: Tea and Local Snacks in Lumbini: It became popular through a mix of local ingredients, migration influence, and city food-lane adaptation.

famous_foods.name: Buddhist Vegetarian Curry
famous_foods.origin_note: Buddhist Vegetarian Curry in Lumbini: Its preparation style comes from household and festival kitchens, then moved into public eateries as demand grew.

famous_foods.name: Fresh Momos
famous_foods.origin_note: Fresh Momos in Lumbini: It grew through market-stall culture where vendors optimized quick, affordable flavor for daily commuters and evening crowds.

city_profile.lifestyle: Calm spiritual environment centered around monasteries, meditation, and slow travel.
local_connect_tips: Keep phone on silent in monasteries.
Use bicycles for eco-friendly local travel.

safety_checklist: Avoid carrying all cash in one place.
Keep offline map and hotel contact ready.
Use marked ATMs and avoid isolated lanes at night.

verified_fare_ranges: Ride-share short trip normal range: NPR 200-480
Taxi short trip normal range: NPR 300-780
scam_red_flags: Driver refuses meter and demands price far above local range.
Someone pushes you to switch to an unmarked vehicle or unofficial guide.
Restaurant/agent avoids printed bill or adds hidden service charges.
Street currency exchange offers rates that are too good to be true.
safe_actions: Confirm price before ride/food order and re-check at payment time.
Use app-based rides or hotel-booked transport at night.
Pay with small notes and avoid exposing full cash wallet.
Choose busy, well-reviewed restaurants and licensed ticket counters.
report_steps: Call Tourist Police 1144 for overcharging or harassment.
Note plate number/business name and keep receipt screenshot.
Share route and fare details with hotel/front desk for support.

budget.notes: Mostly public transport, local eateries, and low ticket-cost spots.

standard.notes: Mix of ride-share and public transport with balanced dining.

premium.notes: Taxi-first mobility, premium cafes/restaurants, and comfort-focused pacing.
